class.name: Edge
class.description: [Edge] represents a single OCCT topological edge. It can build simple line edges and expose endpoints, length, and sampled 3D polyline geometry.

method.name: build_line
method.description: Builds a straight edge between [param start] and [param end].

method.name: get_length
method.description: Returns the OCCT linear length of the edge.

method.name: get_polyline
method.description: Returns a sampled 3D polyline representation of the edge.
